note: 홈/앱상세에 노출할 5★ Google Play 리뷰(손수 큐레이션, 60자 미만·오해 소지 리뷰 배제, 긴 리뷰는 발췌). 후보는 `node scripts/fetch_reviews.js`(다국가) → scripts/_reviews_pool.json. byApp[slug] 를 고치면 해당 앱 상세 + 홈 후기(앱별로 섞어 최대 6개)가 바뀝니다. 리뷰 원문 언어는 그대로 둡니다.

clipboard.name: Fabio Rodriguez
clipboard.text: I reported my frustration about not being able to import a backup from my previous clipboard manager, and the developer promptly updated the app to add that feature. Developers who listen to and act on user feedback deserve high praise.

clipboard.name: Will Burr
clipboard.text: After the developer's reply, I appreciate their willingness to work my suggestion into the app. 5 stars! Also, I found the clip icon, which copies clips with one touch.

clipboard.name: Joseph Younger
clipboard.text: Very easy to understand and use. Really handy, particularly when I am using an older keyboard (one without built-in clipboard access). Thanks so much!!

clipboard.name: Liz W
clipboard.text: Fantastic app, does exactly what I want it to do. Saves all my clips and I can add titles and organize them.

clipboard.name: Jontay
clipboard.text: Absolutely perfect. A bit pricey, but a one-time purchase for an app that covers practically every base of what I'm looking for is a price I'm willing to pay.

autostart.name: James Franke
autostart.text: All I wanted was my app to open on startup. I tried other apps that were recommended, too complicated, and they didn't work. AutoStart+ was easy and it worked the first time.

autostart.name: Nexter1
autostart.text: 처음엔 단순히 자동 실행만 되는 줄 알았는데, 생각보다 훨씬 유용하네요! 매번 부팅할 때마다 자주 쓰는 앱을 일일이 실행하던 번거로움이 사라졌어요. 설정도 간단하고, 광고도 거슬리지 않아서 만족스럽습니다. 스마트폰을 효율적으로 쓰고 싶은 분들께 강력 추천합니다!

autostart.name: Joseph Younger
autostart.text: Super simple to setup and use. Couldn't be easier. Very nicely done as there is no excessive overhead.

volumebooster.name: Liz W
volumebooster.text: WOW! what a difference! I am trying free version & 3 decibel boost helps immensely already! It even has different settings for various types of sound like music, podcast, etc like an equalizer. Already using Clipboard+ from the same developer & it is an awesome app! Highly recommend it!

readfocus.name: 다비
readfocus.text: 난독증 있어서 종이책도 라인자가 있어야 읽는 사람이라, 이북 읽고 싶은 것도 못 읽고 인터넷 자료 서핑도 힘들었는데 이 어플 덕분에 읽을 수 있게 됐습니다. 월정액이나 1년 플랜 다 저렴하고, 무엇보다 영구 결제가 된다는 게 좋네요. 피드백도 빨리 받아주셔서 감사하고, 오래오래 잘 됐으면 좋겠어서 주변에 추천하고 다닐 생각입니다. 저한테 정말 절실한 어플이었어요. 만들어주셔서 감사합니다.
